title: All The Goofs
description: A modpack to have fun and do silly things.
body:
A modpack like no other. In this modpack you can and WILL have fun. Purpose: to have fun and play modded minecraft. You could play with friends and have a server or you could just mess around by your self. Apeal: This modpack is very fun and scary you could also play with friends. The mod has stuff like herobrine and cool little mods like crawl. Moderation decided that I didn't have enough info so here you go.
